info.title: peer
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 wareismymind
config     Create or edit the configuration for peer
show       (Default Verb) Display pull requests assigned to your account
open       Use the default browser to open the pull request URL
details    Show additional details about a PullRequest
help       Display more information on a specific command.
version    Display version information.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Create or edit the configuration for peer

commands.name: show
commands.description: Print the current config and it's location

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Open your config in your default text editor

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.

commands.name: show
commands.description: (Default Verb) Display pull requests assigned to your account

options.name: --sort
options.description:
The sort key and direction you would like to use. The default
sort direction is ascending.
<key>:[(asc|ascending)|(desc|descending)]

The symbols in the show command and their meanings are shown below:
Unknown        => ❔
Draft          => 📃
Conflict       => ⚔️
FailedChecks   => 🔥
ActionsQueued  => 💤
ActionsPending => ⌛
AwaitingReview => 🚩
FixesRequested => ❌
ReadyToMerge   => ✔️
Merged         => 🎊
Stale          => 🍞

The sort option can use a number of different keys and default to ascending
order. The avaliable keys are:
repo
id-lex
id
owner
author
status
active
title

Filtering can be done on any of the sort keys. The filter syntax is:
'key:value', negation is provided by prepending a '!' before the filter key.

commands.name: open
commands.description: Use the default browser to open the pull request URL

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
value pos. 0    Required. A full or partial pull request identifier of the
form provider/org/repo/id partials can be built up from
combinations of sections. For example: '6' to get pull the
pull request with id 6 provided there is only one. If there
are more than one match you'll have to disambiguate by adding
additional qualifiers eg. repoName/6

commands.name: details
commands.description: Show additional details about a PullRequest

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
value pos. 0    Required. A full or partial pull request identifier of the
form provider/org/repo/id partials can be built up from
combinations of sections. For example: '6' to get pull the
pull request with id 6 provided there is only one. If there
are more than one match you'll have to disambiguate by adding
additional qualifiers eg. repoName/6
Since Checks have both a completion state and a result the mapping between
states and symbols in the details command are shown below:
Status: InProgress Result: Unknown => 🔵
Status: Completed  Result: Success => 🟢
Status: Completed  Result: Failure => 🔴
Status: Completed  Result: Neutral => 🤷
Status: Completed  Result: Skipped => 🪢
Status: Completed  Result: Timeout => 🐢

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.
